---
title: "Projects"
---

This page highlights projects involving data science, scientific communication, programming, and computational analysis.

---

## Featured Projects


### [SQL Project](projects/sql_project.qmd)

A project focused on querying and analyzing structured datasets using SQL.

Skills emphasized:

- Database querying
- Data organization
- Relational databases
- Data interpretation

---

### [Text Analysis Project](projects/text_analysis.qmd)

A computational text analysis project involving pattern recognition and visualization of textual datasets.

Skills emphasized:

- Text mining
- Natural language processing
- Data visualization
- Statistical analysis

---

### [pristineR Package](projects/pristineR.qmd)

An R package designed to simplify common data-cleaning and summarization tasks through user-friendly helper functions.

Skills emphasized:

- R package development
- Documentation
- Data cleaning pipelines
- Error handling
- GitHub collaboration

---

### [Poster Project](projects/poster_project.qmd)

A scientific communication project focused on presenting technical material clearly and effectively through visual design.

Skills emphasized:

- Scientific communication
- Figure design
- Data presentation
- Visual storytelling

---

### [Insurance Charges Analysis](projects/research.qmd)

A data science project investigating factors associated with individual medical insurance charges using a publicly available dataset. Through exploratory data analysis, visualization, and regression modeling, I examined the relationships between insurance costs and variables such as age, BMI, smoking status, and geographic region. The project strengthened my ability to analyze real-world datasets and communicate statistical results through clear visualizations and written reports.

Skills emphasized:

- R Programming
- Data visualization
- Statistical modeling
- Regression analysis
- Data interpretation
- Scientific communication
